text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! I'm really sorry about that! I must not be
focusing enough to have yawned!
choice_data_list: Is something wrong? You seem tired.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Well... I was up all night yesterday
self-reflecting in my head.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to understand why I'm always tripping in
hallways, falling down stairs, and sliding into
triple backflips down ramps...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There was so much to reflect on, I continued well
until morning... I'm really sorry I let this happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Meisho Doto hasn't gotten enough
sleep.
